name: Maya Action: Create Render Layer
description: Creates a Maya action that creates a new render setup layer (renderSetup API) and optionally adds members via a collection. Provide member node names comma-separated. Chain via actions_in/actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    layer_name = inputs.get('layer_name') or self.get_parameter('layer_name', 'renderLayer1')
    members = inputs.get('members') or self.get_parameter('members', '')
    make_current = inputs.get('make_current')
    if make_current is None:
        make_current = self.get_parameter('make_current', True)

    action = {
        'type': 'create_render_layer',
        'layer_name': layer_name,
        'members': members,
        'make_current': bool(make_current)
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added create_render_layer action -> {layer_name}')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
